_publications._publicationTitle: NF106: A Neurofibromatosis Clinical Trials Consortium Phase II Trial of the MEK Inhibitor Mirdametinib (PD-0325901) in Adolescents and Adults With NF1-Related Plexiform Neurofibromas.

_contextSnippet: Maximum tumor shrinkage from baseline suggests a positive relationship with mirdametinib exposure (AUC 0-12h ) (R 2  = 0.22;  P  = .052)
details: Maximum tumor shrinkage from baseline suggests a positive relationship with mirdametinib exposure (AUC 0-12h) (R² = 0.22; P = .052)
